# Aspire Type System Capabilities
# Generated by: aspire sdk dump --format ci

# Handle Types
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIModelResource
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIResource

# Capabilities
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/addModel(name: string, model: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIModelResource
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/addOpenAI(name: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIResource
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/withApiKey(apiKey: Aspire.Hosting/Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ParameterResource) -> Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIResource
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/withEndpoint(endpoint: string) -> Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIResource
Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/withHealthCheck() -> Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI/Aspire.Hosting.OpenAI.OpenAIModelResource
